real_interview.content: <synch>

IntroV4Confirmation (hi i'm ellie thanks for coming in today i was created to talk to people in a safe and secure environment i'm not a therapist but i'm here to learn about people and would love to learn about you i'll ask a few questions to get us started and please feel free to tell me anything your answers are totally confidential are you ok with this)
yes
okay_confirm (okay)
how_doingV (so how are you doing today)
i'm doing good
thats_good (that's good)
where_originally (where are you from originally)
uh los angeles
really (really)
mhm
like_about_LA (what are some things you really like about l_a)
convenience
convenience
mhm (mhm)
dont_like_LA (what are some things you don't really like about l_a)
uh
people the crowd
uh traffic
see_mean (i see what you mean)
people not respecting <re> uh eh lack of respect
yeah3 (yeah)
uh huh
travel_shoes (i'm sure you can tell by my shoes i'm not much of a world explorer do you travel a lot)
<laughter>
uh locally regionally
cool3 (cool)
travel_changed (what do you enjoy about traveling)
meeting old people <laughter> i love talking to old people
travel_trips (i'd love to hear about one of your trips)
um
well i work a lot with uh my elders in my reservation and other reservations here in california
and i spend a lot of time with uh with the elders and i talk with them and they help me out a lot
so i get to hear good stories
good_hear (that's so good to hear)
mhm
memorableB (what's one of your most memorable experiences)
mm
uh going in the mountains and seeing waterfalls that no one else had seen except for my people
yeah that was the most beautiful thing i think i found
wow (wow)
mm
mhm <laughter>
shyoutgoing (do you consider yourself more shy or outgoing)
um it depends on the situation if i'm um if somebody comes to me
looking for me to help them i take control
but if i need help it's eh i i work at asking for help so
it depends on the situation
makes_sense (that makes sense)
mhm
relax_fishtank (sometimes when i'm feeling tense i turn on the fish tank screensaver hey i know it's not hawaii but it's the best i've got what do you do to relax)
i garden
and i paint
nice (nice)
control_temper (how are you at controlling your temper)
mm i'm very good at it
thats_good (that's good)
last_argument (when was the last time you argued with someone and what was it about)
uh three days ago it was about communication it was uh the lack of communication on the other person's part
and
i needed them to communicate better so that way i could understand
uh they didn't communicate so we had an argument
and uh got it settled <laughter>
describe_felt (how did you feel in that moment)
i felt um caught off guard
because this is a individual that i spend pretty much almost every minute of my day with and to not be told what was going on in this person's head and then to have a situation arise
you know i was kept out i didn't like that
mm (mm)
uh
situation_handled (tell me about a situation that you wish you had handled differently)
mm i'd rather pass <laughter>
okay_confirm (okay)
mm
feelguilty (what's something you feel guilty about)
uh
um probably the lack of time spent with my grandparents
growing up
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
it's just when they're gone you regret that you didn't miss time with spent time with them
so
sorry_hear (i'm sorry to hear that)
memory_erase (tell me about an event or something that you wish you could erase from your memory)
mm
uh one thing i truly wish i could remember i i was a
i was a professional athlete at one time and
i had partied 'til like four in the morning and then i had did my event at like ten o'clock in the morning
and uh
i was my xxx captain and i embarrassed my whole team
and uh
that's one thing i truly regret
i was a professional fighter so
avoid (could you have done anything to avoid it)
yeah <sigh> like not party thought about other people besides myself
isee_downer (i see)
mhm
study (what did you study at school)
uh
i studied uh massage therapy and got my nursing degree
um
and a lot of it's just been on job education
sounds_interesting (that sounds interesting)
how_close (how close are you to them)
um very close
hard_decision (how did you decide to do that)
uh
uh due to my own injuries um
i had just gone through the therapy process and believing in people and seeing how it worked
and i decided to do that i wanted to help people too
happy_didthat (are you happy you did that)
yeah
oh yeah yeah
still_working_on_X (are you still working in that)
yes
dream_job (what's your dream job)
i wanna paint
that's all i wanna do is just paint <laughter>
awesome (awesome)
hard_decisionB (tell me about the hardest decision you've ever had to make)
um
i have two sons and it's time for me to uh
to move on and they're older
and they can take care of themselves now
so me leaving the area where my sons are
it's pretty hard
easy_parent (do you find it easy to be a parent)
yeah
oh
parent_best (what's the best thing about being a parent)
the reflection of you <laughter> the reflection of you
reminds you so much about yourself
who you are
parent_hardest (what's the hardest thing about being a parent)
consistency
even when you're sick <laughter> being consistent
parent_differences (what are some ways that you're different as a parent than your parents)
i don't assume my kids are right or wrong
i listen to 'em first
and i make my decisions after that
and i try not to come from an emotional
heightened place
i think logically and i put myself in their place
before i do it we discuss we communicate heavy in my family
uh 'cause that's the only way we get along with each other is through communication
mhm (mhm)
so communicate
family_relationship (tell me about your relationship with your family)
um my family is severed pretty much so my family and my relationship with my family
on the reservation is very tight
um the rest of the family we're all fragmented and scattered around the southwest so it's not very tight at all
influence_positive (who's someone that's been a positive influence in your life)
uh
i have too many to count um
start with my uncle my uncle was like my dad raised me a good way
uh xxx
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
uh he watched out for me he told me he taught me hard work at a very young age
um
he also taught me to protect my family
and taught me honor
taught me love
he's a good man
thats_great (that's great)
easy_sleep (how easy is it for you to get a good night's sleep)
mm i don't i haven't had a good night's sleep in years so i i have get broken sleep
why2 (why)
uh dreams the dreams become too real
symptoms_cope (how do you cope with them)
i get up and go to the bathroom <laughter> and go back to sleep <laughter> i try to <laughter>
trigger (are they triggered by something)
um <sigh> um
my years of fighting it just uh it caught up to me
sleep_affects (what are you like when you don't sleep well)
xxx
uh reserved
yeah
reserved and i try to find things to distract my brain i think of different ways of doing things
uh_huh (uh huh)
uh
like_what (like what)
mm
well i got rid of t_v about eight months ago so i got rid of that distraction so what i do now is
i either paint
i garden
or cleaning house washing dishes
you know or get out and go walk that's another thing too do a lot of walking nowadays
thats_good (that's good)
feel_lately (how have you been feeling lately)
uh anxiety <anxi> anxious <sigh> uh um a lot of anxieties
uh but it's good i have techniques to bring myself down now
behavior_changes (have you noticed any changes in your behavior or thoughts lately)
um
nothing new
out of the normal
okay_confirm (okay)
ptsd_diagnosed (have you ever been diagnosed with p_t_s_d)
yes
when_diagnosed (how long ago were you diagnosed)
uh three years ago <sigh> around there three <sigh>
why_seek_help (what got you to seek help)
insomnia issues
therapy_going (do you still go to therapy now)
um it was about
two years ago around there
two little bit over two years ago i was released from therapy
stop_going (why did you stop)
oh the therapist released me
okay_confirm (okay)
therapy_changes (what sort of changes have you noticed since you've been going to therapy)
um
well i had i noticed is i still deal with pictures and emotions
but what i do is now i've i really practice hard at taking care of myself and and getting to those places the things that
strike me that get get me anxious or excited or angry
i've learned how to
work out of it and realize it's not real
it's not real
it's just the emotion it's not real
so these are the things like little mantras that i tell myself
and this has really helped me a lot from therapy because it taught me that those emotions and pictures truly aren't real
and yeah so therapy has helped a lot i mean it's just it's changed my world
yeah_downer (yeah)
depression_diagnosed (have you been diagnosed with depression)
yes
when_diagnosed (how long ago were you diagnosed)
around the same time as the p_t_s_d
uh three years ago
disturbing_thoughts (do you have disturbing thoughts)
um <sigh> in my dreams when i dream i do
bouts_symptoms (when was the last time that happened)
last night
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
i was just dreaming of fighting and then in preparing fighters to fight and that was another thing too i build up anxiety dreaming about preparing fighters to fight
and then stepping in front of thousands of people and then i always end up fighting in my dreams
so it's always mm what gets me scared in all my dreams is that i should've made the move and finished the fight and i didn't
and so it builds anxiety and stress in me and then i tend to act out in my sleep
hmm_downer (hmm)
yeah
describe_felt (how did you feel in that moment)
like it was real like i was there
like like i smell taste feel everything there i was there
been_hard (that sounds really hard)
yeah
happy_lasttime (tell me about the last time you felt really happy)
uh this morning
<laughter> driving here
talking to my girlfriend
aw (aw)
this mm
BF_describe (how would your best friend describe you)
trustworthy
he loves me i love him
he's we're best friends
good_hear (that's so good to hear)
self_change (what are some things you wish you could change about yourself)
i have zero to change
feelbadly (tell me about a time when someone made you feel really badly about yourself)
mm
i can't recall
okay_confirm (okay)
regret (is there anything you regret)
regret
uh
just not spending time with my grandparents and and
i think day to day issues maybe you know a couple here there that i should've went to the store first or something like that but i mean
wild_laughter3 ((laughter))
yeah it's nothing like that xxx
advice_back (what advice would you give to yourself ten or twenty years ago)
quit thinking you know it all
yeah
Ellie17Dec2012_07 (what would you say are some of your best qualities)
my loyalty
my trustworthiness
Ellie17Dec2012_10 (tell me about something you did recently that you really enjoyed)
mm start a new art project yesterday
it was nice
tell_about_that (can you tell me about that)
mm
well i i
we were in santa barbara and we found some rocks and yeah some old rocks that someone had made a pile of and just threw a dump of old rocks out of the way and i went through the pile of rocks and
i found this old rock that was in the middle of it
and i took it home and now i'm doing a art piece on it and for me it was like this thing was totally forgotten about was just considered a rock
and now potentially it'll be sitting on my grandkid's table you know it's just to me that's really cool i like that
awesome (awesome)
Ellie17Dec2012_08 (what are you most proud of in your life)
mm
start starting something
that
i'm so bad at
that i don't think there's no way i can be good at it and all the sudden i get
to be better at it to where i don't even have to think about it just so good at it that way i could just touch it and feel it and i don't think about it
i these are the things that i'm proud of like
i like that i like that
accomplishment i guess you can say
yeah3 (yeah)
asked_everything (okay i think i have asked everything i need to)
appreciate_open (thanks for sharing your thoughts with me)
mm
bye (goodbye)
bye <laughter>
